title: Talley Valley Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Talley Valley Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Arunachal Pradesh

heroImage.alt: Talley Valley Wildlife Sanctuary, Arunachal Pradesh

overview.short: Talle Valley Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area in Arunachal Pradesh, India, with an area of 337 km2 (130 sq mi).
overview.description: Talle Valley Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area in Arunachal Pradesh, India, with an area of 337 km2 (130 sq mi). It was established in 1995. It is also known as Talley Valley Wildlife Sanctuary. It ranges in elevation from 1,200 to 3,000 m (3,900 to 9,800 ft) and harbours subtropical and temperate broadleaved and conifer forests.

topPlaces.name: Ziro
topPlaces.description: Ziro is a town in and the district headquarters of the Lower Subansiri district of the Indian state of Arunachal Pradesh. The part of the town which is the centre of economic activities and where the administrative offices are located is called Hapoli, or locally known by the Apatanis as "Hao-Polyang".

topPlaces.name: Hapoli
topPlaces.description: Hapoli is a locality in the town of Ziro, the headquarters of Lower Subansiri district, Arunachal Pradesh, India. The Apatanis are the natives of this place and also form the majority of the population.

topPlaces.name: Lempia
topPlaces.description: Lempia is a village near Ziro in Lower Subansiri district of Arunachal Pradesh

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Talley Valley Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Talley Valley Wildlife Sanctuary is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Talley Valley Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jorhat Airport (95 km) and the nearest railway station is Dimapur Railway Station (183 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Talley Valley Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Talley Valley Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Talley Valley Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Talley Valley Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Talley Valley Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ziro, Hapoli, Lempia.
